backstory.original: Thellora, a centaur paladin, belongs to an all-female regiment known as the Luma. These fifty-three centaurs are diverse, but unified in that each possess a distinctive golden right eye. The centaurs believe these individuals are chosen by their god, Callessa, to be devoted guardians and trained warriors. With their divine connection and martial prowess, they protect their land, embracing their unique gifts with unwavering dedication.
backstory.display: 半人马圣武士德萝拉隶属于一个名为露玛的全女性军团。军团中的五十三位半人马各形各色，但共同点是都拥有一只独特的金色右眼。半人马族群坚信这些同胞由他们的神祇卡莱萨亲自遴选，都是忠诚的守护者和训练有素的战士。凭借神圣的羁绊与高超的武力，她们保家卫国，以坚定不移的奉献精神发扬着自己独特的天赋。

description.original: Thellora strikes an enemy with her hooves, and another with her blade.
description.display: 德萝拉用她的蹄子攻击一个敌人，用她的剑攻击另一个敌人。

description.original: Thellora charges through the enemies, and then increases the damage of all champions for a short while.
description.display: 德萝拉冲过敌人，然后增加所有勇士的伤害，持续片刻。

longDescription.original: Thellora charges through the enemies, dealing 1 massive hit to them in a wide path. She then increases the damage of all champions by 400% for 15 seconds.
longDescription.display: 德萝拉冲过敌人，沿着一条宽阔的路径对他们造成一次巨大的打击。然后她让所有勇士的伤害提高 400%，持续 15 秒。

description.original: Thellora increases the damage of Champions in the column behind her.
description.display: 德萝拉会提高处于她后列勇士的伤害。

description.original: Thellora skips the first few areas of adventures, depending on the campaign's favor and the number of rush stacks she acquired in a previous adventure.
description.display: 德萝拉会跳过冒险的前几个区域，具体取决于战役的恩赐以及她在之前的冒险中获得的冲刺堆叠数量。

description.pre: Thellora gains a Rush stack for every $(amount) areas she completes in an adventure, and these stacks persist through resets. Thellora's Rush Target is equal to her number of Rush stacks or the current campaign's favor exponent, whichever is smaller. When Thellora attacks her first enemy she has enough damage to defeat in an adventure, she spends all her Rush stacks and skips to the first area past her Rush Target. Thellora gathers all the rewards (including gold) from bosses skipped in this fashion, but nothing from normal monsters.

在一次冒险中，德萝拉每完成 $(amount) 个区域就会获得 1 层猛冲堆叠，并且这些堆叠层数会持续到冒险重置。德萝拉的猛冲目标等于她的猛冲堆叠层数或当前战役的恩赐指数，以较少者为准。当德萝拉在一次冒险中攻击以她的伤害足以将其击败的第一个敌人时，她会消耗掉她所有的猛冲堆叠层数，并直接跳到她猛冲目标之后的第一个区域。德萝拉会收集跳过的首领掉落的所有奖励（包括金币），但不会收集普通怪物掉落的任何奖励。

tipText.original: Thellora skips the first few areas of adventures, depending on the campaign's favor and the number of rush stacks she acquired in a previous adventure.
tipText.display: 德萝拉会跳过冒险的前几个区域，具体取决于战役的恩赐以及她在之前的冒险中获得的冲刺堆叠数量。

description.desc: Thellora increases the damage of Champions in the column behind her by $(amount)%.
德萝拉会使处于她后方一列的勇士提高 $(amount)% 伤害。

tipText.original: Thellora increases the damage of Champions in the column behind her.
tipText.display: 德萝拉会提高处于她后列勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Each time Thellora attacks and doesn't kill an enemy, she increases the effect of Strength of the Luma by $(not_buffed amount)% until the area changes, stacking multiplicatively and capped at $(max_stacks) stacks.
每次德萝拉攻击且未杀死敌人时，她会使“露玛之力”的效果增加 $(not_buffed amount)%，直到区域改变，该数值以乘算方式堆叠，上限为 $(max_stacks) 层。

Thellora increases the damage of Champions with a STR of $(min_stat_amount___2) or less by $(amount)% for each such Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively. Buffs apply to the pre-stack value.
阵型中每有一位力量小于或等于 $(min_stat_amount___2) 的勇士，德萝拉均使此类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。增益作用于堆叠前的数值。

specializationDescription.original: Thellora focuses on improving the weakest Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 德萝拉专注于强化最弱的勇士。

description.desc: Thellora increases the damage of Speed Champions by $(amount)% for each such Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively. Buffs apply to the pre-stack value.
阵型中每有一位速度型勇士，德萝拉就会使所有此类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。增益作用于堆叠前的数值。

specializationDescription.original: Thellora runs with the fastest Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 德萝拉与最迅捷的勇士同行。

description.desc: Thellora increases the damage of Female and Non-Binary Champions by $(amount)% for each such Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively. Buffs apply to the pre-stack value.
阵型中每有一位女性及无性别勇士，德萝拉就会使所有此类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。增益作用于堆叠前的数值。

specializationDescription.original: Thellora allies with those that have been blessed by her deity.
specializationDescription.display: 德萝拉与被她的神祇祝福过的人结盟。

description.desc: Thellora increases the health of all other Champions by $(amount)% of her max health and any healing effect on those Champions is increased by $(amount___2)%.
德萝拉会增加其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于她最大生命值的 $(amount)%，并且针对这些勇士的所有治疗效果提高 $(amount___2)%。

description.pre: The effects of feats assigned to Thellora also apply to all adjacent Champions. Note that feats that buff her formation abilities have no effect when applied to other Champions.
德萝拉配备的专长效果也会作用于所有相邻勇士。请注意，增强她阵型技能的专长对其他勇士没有作用。

description.original: My life for my people.
description.display: 我的生命属于我的人民。

description.original: The shadows are descending! Together we will show them the light!
description.display: 阴影降临了！我们将齐心协力向他们展示光明！

description.original: I'm not even close to finished.
description.display: 我可不会轻易倒下。

description.original: I will see this battle to its end!
description.display: 我要将这场战斗进行到底！

description.original: Shields up!
description.display: 举起盾牌！

description.original: No matter how many there are, my devotion to Callessa will never waver.
description.display: 无论有多少敌人，我对卡莱萨的忠诚绝不动摇。

description.original: Their eyes will be on my spear when my sword cuts through them.
description.display: 当他们盯着我的矛时，我的剑将切开他们的身体。

description.original: Stand together! They will not break us!
description.display: 靠拢！他们无法击溃我们！

description.original: Even if they surround us, they will not break our strength!
description.display: 他们即使包围我们，也无法摧毁我们的力量！

description.original: Callessa will not abandon us! Her power flows through our blades!
description.display: 卡莱萨不会抛弃我们！她的力量在我们的剑刃上流淌！

description.original: I will not let the Luma down. Ever.
description.display: 我不会让露玛失望。绝不。

description.original: We've cut them off! Take them while their numbers are low!
description.display: 我们把他们截断了！趁他们人数不多时干掉他们！

effects.description: Reduces the number of areas required per Rush stack for Thellora's Plateaus of Unicorn Run ability by $amount%

description.original: We're not done here yet.
description.display: 我们还没完呢。

description.original: A tactician is only as good as their knowledge.
description.display: 战术家的能力取决于其知识。

description.original: With me! Overwhelm them with our combined might! Make them fear us!
description.display: 跟着我！用我们联合的力量击溃他们！让他们惧怕我们！

description.original: Altogether now! The bards shall sing of our charge!
description.display: 大家一起上！吟游诗人们会用歌声传颂我们的冲锋的！

character_sheet_details.backstory: Thellora, a centaur paladin, belongs to an all-female regiment known as the Luma. These fifty-three centaurs are diverse, but unified in that each possess a distinctive golden right eye. The centaurs believe these individuals are chosen by their god, Callessa, to be devoted guardians and trained warriors. With their divine connection and martial prowess, they protect their land, embracing their unique gifts with unwavering dedication.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Thellora is a Support, Tanking, and Speed Champion that skips over the first few areas of an adventure and she increases the damage of Champions in the column behind her.

event_upgrades.name: Strength of the Luma
event_upgrades.description: Thellora increases the damage of Champions in the column behind her.

event_upgrades.name: Paladin's Resolve
event_upgrades.description: Thellora skips the first few areas of adventures, depending on the campaign's favor and the number of rush stacks she acquired in a previous adventure.
